g.text: node = alloc(ListNode) node->value = value node->prev = NULL node->next = l->head if (l->head) l->head->prev = node l->head = node if (!l->tail) l->tail = node l->len++ return l '
if (!l->head) return NULL node = l->head value = node->value l->head = node->next if (l->head) l->head->prev = NULL else l->tail = NULL l->len-- free(node) return value '
